notes: Spec asserts: ready → working → waiting once any tool fires under plan mode. Plan mode is engaged via settings.permissions.defaultMode=plan (passed through to claude via --settings), so the session starts in plan mode and any tool_use the agent emits — including ExitPlanMode — opens a permission prompt that drives the session into waiting. The recipe currently records the canonical flow where the agent writes the plan to a file then calls ExitPlanMode; the Write tool_use is the first permission gate, ExitPlanMode is the second. Both routes through PreToolUse → PermissionPending=true land in waiting. Final state = waiting.

text: Session appears in ready after launch
User prompt (in plan mode) drives ready → working
Agent emits ExitPlanMode tool_use → user-blocking tool open → waiting (rule 1, race-belt by PermissionPending rule 0)
